---
title: 'Happy Star Wars Day! May the 4th be with you!'
date: '2014-05-05T00:02:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '143995891609133994'
blogger_filename: '/2014/05/happy-star-wars-day-may-4th-be-with-you.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Enjoy'
---

Today is May 4th. And it's Star Wars Day!<br />
<br />
For those of you who are a little slow on uptake with this one; say:<br />
May the Force<br />
Now say:<br />
May the 4th<br />
Aha! I get it!
